entries: The Painted Lady wears masks enchanted with painted runes, which amplify its powers. At the start of each of its turns, the Painted Lady changes its mask, choosing from the following options.

items.name: Bitterness
entries: Creatures have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against the next spell the Painted Lady casts.

items.name: Determination
entries: The Painted Lady has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against spells and other magical effects.

items.name: Spite
entries: A creature that hits the Painted Lady with a Melee Attack takes 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Acid damage.

items.name: Vigor
entries: The Painted Lady's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} increases by 10 feet.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Painted Lady uses its paintbrush staff as a Spellcasting Focus. Its spells fling powerful enchanted paint at their targets.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Painted Lady makes two Paint attacks.

action.name: Paint
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d4 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 3d4}) Acid damage.

action.name: Minions of the Muse {@recharge 6}
entries: The Painted Lady summons {@dice 1d4 + 1} {@creature Miniquin|HFN2025} in unoccupied spaces it can see within 30 feet of it. {@creature Miniquin|HFN2025} summoned in this way have their colours randomly determined and have a +11 attack bonus instead of the normal value. The {@creature Miniquin|HFN2025} take their turns immediately after the Painted Lady on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count, and they obey the Painted Lady. The {@creature Miniquin|HFN2025} disappear when they or the Painted Lady die.

legendary.name: Painterly Stride
entries: The Painted Lady moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and it makes one Paint attack.

legendary.name: Puppetry
entries: Up to two mannequins summoned by the Painted Lady move up to their {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and then make an attack.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 2 Uses)
entries: The Painted Lady uses Spellcasting.

trait.name: Colour Coded
entries: When the Miniquin is summoned, it's given one of four colours, each of which is associated with one damage type: blue (Cold), green (Acid), red (Fire), or yellow (Lightning). The Miniquin has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to the damage type associated with its given colour.

action.name: Brush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) of the type associated with the miniquin's colour per its Colour Coded trait, and the target is covered in paint of that colour for 1 minute. Whenever a creature covered in paint takes damage of the type associated with the paint's colour, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) of the same type.

action.name: Brush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Cold damage , and the target is covered in paint of that colour for 1 minute. Whenever a creature covered in paint takes Cold damage, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Cold damage.

action.name: Brush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Acid damage, and the target is covered in paint of that colour for 1 minute. Whenever a creature covered in paint takes Acid damage, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Acid damage.

action.name: Brush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Fire damage, and the target is covered in paint of that colour for 1 minute. Whenever a creature covered in paint takes Fire damage, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Fire damage.

action.name: Brush
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Lightning damage, and the target is covered in paint of that colour for 1 minute. Whenever a creature covered in paint takes Lightning damage, it takes an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Lightning damage.

trait.name: Arcanomagnetic Field
entries: Ranged Attack Rolls made with ferrous ammunition and Ranged Spell Attacks against the Magnétanque have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Ferrosense
entries: The Magnétanque can sense any ferrous objects within 120 feet of it, including through {@variantrule Total Cover|XPHB}.

trait.name: Stretching Current
entries: At the start of its turn, the Magnétanque can extend its arms, increasing the reach of its Maglock Arm attacks to 15 feet until the end of its turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Magnétanque makes two Maglock Arm attacks.

action.name: Maglock Arm
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 15}). The Magnétanque has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the Attack Roll if the target is wearing ferrous armour. The Magnétanque can grapple up to two creatures in this way.

action.name: Arcanomagnetic Pulse
entries: Each creature within 60 feet must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity Saving Throw. Creatures {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the Magnétanque have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}. On a failure, a creature takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Lightning damage, or 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Lightning damage if it is within 20 feet. On a success, a creature takes half damage.

bonus.name: Pulsing Hands
entries: One creature the Magnétanque can see within 90 feet must make a {@dc 15} Strength Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is moved 30 feet straight towards or away from the Magnétanque (Magnétanque's choice).

trait.name: Consume Chroma
entries: Whenever the Bicephal Wyrmhole is subjected to Radiant damage, it regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the Radiant damage dealt.

trait.name: Distortion Armour
entries: The Bicephal Wyrmhole bends light around it in strange ways, making it difficult to track visually. While in {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB}, the Bicephal Wyrmhole has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Three-Quarters Cover}. A {@condition Blinded|XPHB} creature, or one that closes its eyes or does not rely on sight, ignores this cover.

trait.name: Gravity Well
entries: The area within 10 feet of the Bicephal Wyrmhole is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for creatures other than Bicephal Wyrmholes.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Bicephal Wyrmhole makes one Stinger attack and one Warping Blade attack.

action.name: Stinger
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage. The target must make a {@dc 15} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is disoriented and immediately uses its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move a distance equal to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} in a random direction.

action.name: Warping Blade
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Force damage. Each creature within 5 feet of the target takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Force damage.

bonus.name: Gravity Suspension {@recharge 5}
entries: The Bicephal Wyrmhole disables gravity around it. Creatures and objects within 60 feet of it come under the effects of the {@spell Levitate|XPHB} spell and rise 15 feet into the air if not tethered to the ground. At the start of the Bicephal Wyrmhole's next turn, gravity rapidly intensifies, and creatures without a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} or that otherwise aren't held aloft fall to the ground. Double the fall distance when calculating damage from falling in this way.

trait.name: Head Empty
entries: If the Somnoblin takes 5 or more Psychic damage in a single instance, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Obsessive Drive
entries: Each Somnoblin has a core drive. Roll a {@dice d6} to determine the Somnoblin's drive and its effects.

items.name: Destruction
entries: The Somnoblin only finds joy in violence. It deals double damage to objects and structures.

items.name: Escape
entries: The Somnoblin is fearful, only cares about survival, and spreads panic. It doesn't provoke an {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB} when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

items.name: Fame
entries: Nothing pleases the Somnoblin more than adoring fans. It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an Attack Roll against a creature if at least one of the Somnoblin's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}.

items.name: Knowledge
entries: The Somnoblin is obsessed with collecting magical knowledge and is accustomed to spells. It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against spells and other magical effects.

items.name: Protection
entries: The Somnoblin uses its defenses to protect others from attacks. It has a +2 bonus to AC.

items.name: Subterfuge
entries: The Somnoblin has a knack for backstabbing. Once per turn, when the Somnoblin hits a target with a Weapon Attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the Attack Roll, the Somnoblin deals an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage.

action.name: Bonk
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Adoration (Fame Only)
entries: Each creature within 30 feet must make a {@dc 13} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the Somnoblin until the end of the target's next turn.

action.name: Bombs Away (Destruction Only)
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 4} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 3d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Guardian (Protection Only)
entries: Each enemy within 30 feet must make a {@dc 13} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Attack Rolls against creatures other than the Somnoblin until the end of the target's next turn.

action.name: Panic (Escape Only)
entries: Each creature within 30 feet must make a {@dc 13} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is {@condition Frightened|XPHB} of the Somnoblin until the end of the target's next turn.

bonus.name: Sneaky (Subterfuge Only)
entries: The Somnoblin becomes {@condition Invisible|XPHB} until the start of its next turn or until immediately after it makes an attack.

reaction.name: Spell Snatcher (Knowledge Only)
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the Somnoblin casts a spell of 3rd-level or lower. {@actResponse} The Somnoblin makes an Intelligence ({@skill Arcana|XPHB}) check with a DC equal to 10 plus the spell's level. On a success, the spell has no effect, and the Somnoblin gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the spell's level.

trait.name: Caustic Pool
entries: As long at the High Priest's acid pool is filled, it gains the following effects:

items: Its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 5 feet.
It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against spells and other magical effects.
It regains 2 ({@damage 1d4}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns.
A creature that hits it with a Melee Attack takes 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Toppled Dish
entries: When the High Priest is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}, the acid in its dish spills, emptying it, and each creature within 5 feet of the High Priest takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Acid damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The High Priest uses its Staff as a Spellcasting Focus.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The High Priest makes two Staff attacks.

action.name: Staff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Acid damage.

action.name: Outpouring of Blessings
entries: The High Priest empties its acid pool, pouring it out onto a willing creature within 5 feet of it. Until the end of the High Priest's next turn, the creature is blessed: it has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Attack Rolls. In addition, any creature without {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} or {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Acid damage that moves to a space within 30 feet of the blessed creature for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a {@dc 16} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is unable to willingly move closer to the blessed creature.

action.name: Outpouring of Pain
entries: The High Priest empties its acid pool, pouring it out onto an enemy. One creature within 5 feet must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failure, the target takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Acid damage, and any nonmagical metal objects the target is wearing or carrying begin to rust. Metal armour and Shields take a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC they provide, and metal weapons take a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to Attack and Damage Rolls. An armour reduced to an AC of 10, a Shield reduced to a bonus of +0, or a weapon with a penalty of -5 is destroyed. On a success, the target takes half damage only.

bonus.name: Acrid Fountain
entries: The High Priest refills its acid pool. It can't take this {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} if it's {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

trait.name: Emergent Pulse
entries: When the Stonemaw emerges from underground for the first time on a turn, nearby creatures are flung backwards. {@actSave dex} {@dc 16} Each creature within 5 feet of the Stonemaw when it surfaces. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Bludgeoning damage, and is pushed 10 feet straight away from the Stonemaw and knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} Pushed away only.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: If the Stonemaw is motionless underground at the start of combat, it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} roll. Moreover, if a creature hasn't observed the Stonemaw move or act, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 18} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check to discern that the Stonemaw's teeth aren't ordinary stones.

trait.name: Gravity Tunnels
entries: The Stonemaw can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the Stonemaw doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: Thunder Weakness
entries: The Stonemaw has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} made against spells and other effects that deal Thunder damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Stonemaw makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, and the Stonemaw has no more than three Medium or Small creatures swallowed, then the target is subjected to the following effect {@actSave str} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target is swallowed.

A swallowed target is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, it has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} against attacks and other effects outside the Stonemaw, and it takes 15 ({@damage 6d4}) Acid damage at the start of each of the Stonemaw's turns. If the Stonemaw takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from sources inside it, it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Constitution Saving Throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls {@condition Prone|XPHB} in a space within 10 feet of the Stonemaw. If the Stonemaw dies, any swallowed creature is no longer {@condition Restrained|XPHB} by it and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Graviturgic Rock
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 10} to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. {@h}20 ({@damage 2d12 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSave str} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Gaping Jaw
entries: The Stonemaw uses gravity to draw creatures in towards its waiting mouth. {@actSave str} {@dc 16} Each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail}The target is pulled to the nearest unoccupied space within 5 feet of the Stonemaw.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The Obakitsu can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Obakitsu fails a Saving Throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Yokai Dawn
entries: If the Obakitsu dies, it reappears in {@dice 1d8 + 1} dawns in the nearest place of honourable combat, and regains all its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. This trait doesn't function if the Obakitsu is killed by Radiant damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Obakitsu makes five Tail Armoury attacks, each using a different weapon.

action.name: Tail Armoury
entries: The Obakitsu transforms one of its tails into a golden weapon for a single attack. {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 11} to hit, see weapon option for reach/range. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Lightning damage. The Obakitsu also creates one of the following effects depending on the weapon used:

items.name: Bô
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB|D20 Tests} using Dexterity and Intelligence until the end of its next turn.

items.name: Kanabo
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSave str} {@dc 19} Each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Obakitsu. {@actSaveFail} The target is pushed 10 feet straight away from the Obakitsu.

items.name: Katana
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) Slashing damage, and the target glows golden. The next Attack Roll against it before the end of the Obakitu's next turn has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.

items.name: Kodachi
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Slashing damage. Until the end of the target's next turn, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved and its AC is reduced by its Dexterity modifier (minimum 0).

items.name: Kusarigama
entries: Reach 10 ft.; 8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Slashing damage. {@actSave dex} {@dc 19} One creature of the Obakitsu's choice within 10 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

items.name: Longbow
entries: Range 150/600 ft.; 10 ({@damage 1d10 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the area within a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centred on the target is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} by golden mist until the start of the Obakitsu's next turn.

items.name: Naginata
entries: Reach 10 ft.; 9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the target is run through by the weapon and {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 19}) until the Obakitsu moves or uses its naginata again. When this grapple ends, the target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Piercing damage.

items.name: Tonfa
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 8 ({@damage 1d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target drops any items of the Obakitsu's choice it is holding, with the objects landing on a space of the Obakitsu's choice within 15 feet of the target.

items.name: Twinblade
entries: Reach 5 ft.; 10 ({@damage 2d4 + 5}) Slashing damage. {@actSave dex} {@dc 19} One creature of the Obakitsu's choice within 10 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} The Obakitsu is hit by a Melee Attack roll. {@actResponse} The Obakitsu adds 6 to its AC against the attack, possibly causing it to miss.

reaction.name: Swirling Tails
entries: {@actTrigger} The Obakitsu is hit by a Ranged Weapon Attack. {@actResponse} The Obakitsu reduces the damage it takes from the attack by 15 ({@damage 6d4}), and if that damage is reduced to 0, the Obakitsu flings the ammunition at a target of its choice. {@atk rw} {@hit 11} to hit, range 60/120. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) damage of the triggering attack's type.

legendary.name: Tail Armoury
entries: The Obakitsu makes one Tail Armoury attack.

legendary.name: Always Prepared
entries: The Obakitsu regains its expended {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}.

trait.name: Fog Veil
entries: While the Purrmafrost isn't {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, the area within a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Purrmafrost is filled with a gentle fog and is {@variantrule Lightly Obscured|XPHB} for non-Purrmafrost creatures. A strong wind (such as the one created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}) disperses it until the start of the Purrmafrost's next turn

trait.name: Snowy Stealth
entries: The Purrmafrost can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an Ability Check. Additionally, {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement. When it walks through snow, it leaves no discernable tracks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Purrmafrost makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Cold damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 14} A Wet creature hit by this attac. {@actSaveFail} The target is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. The condition ends early if it takes Fire damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Frost Breath
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 13} Each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. Wet creatures have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the saving throw. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Cold damage, and if the target is Wet, it is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. The condition ends early if it takes Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Hidden Crouch
entries: While in areas of fog or mist, the Purrmafrost takes the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

bonus.name: Illusion Fog {@recharge 6}
entries: The Purrmafrost creates damp fog in a 15-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on itself. The area is {@variantrule Heavily Obscured|XPHB} for non-Purrmafrost creatures. The Purrmafrost then teleports to an unoccupied space it can see within 15 feet. This fog lasts for 1 minute or until a strong wind (such as the one created by {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB}) disperses it. A creature that ends its turn in the fog becomes Wet.

The fog swirls into strange shapes, projecting enticing images into the minds of those who see it. Each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the fog and can see it must make a {@dc 13} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is enticed by the images in the fog and can't willingly move away from it until the start of the target's next turn.

trait.name: Trampler
entries: If the Mantiroar moves 20+ feet straight toward a creature immediately before making a Melee Attack against it, the Mantiroar has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the Attack Roll.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Mantiroar makes one Claw attack or uses Sweeping Strike, and it makes either one Skewering Tail attack or two Spikeshot attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 17}). Until the grapple ends, the creature is {@condition Restrained|XPHB}, and the Mantiroar can't make Claw attacks against a target other than the one it's grappling.

action.name: Skewering Tail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage. A Medium or smaller target is impaled on the blade of the tail and is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 17}). The grapple ends if the Mantiroar uses Skewering Tail again. When the grapple ends, the target takes 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Slashing damage as the blade leaves its body.

action.name: Spikeshot
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 9} to hit, range 30/90 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Sweeping Strike
entries: The Mantiroar sweeps its blade in a wide arc. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17} Each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Mantiroar. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Slashing damage. {@actSaveSuccess}Half damage.

action.name: Heroic Charge
entries: The Mantiroar wreaths itself in golden light and charges 40 feet in a straight line, passing through the spaces of creatures smaller than it. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17} Each creature in the Mantiroar's path. {@actSaveFail} 19 ({@damage 3d12}) Bludgeoning damage and is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.
The charge leaves a glowing light in the affected area. At the end of the next enemy's turn, the light flashes brightly, dealing 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage to each creature in the area.

bonus.name: Roar of Glory {@recharge 5}
entries: The Mantiroar lets out a roar of challenge, unravelling magical obstructions that would taint honourable combat. Spells of level 3 or lower within 60 feet of the Mantiroar end.

monster.name: Reef Avatar
senses: ripplesense 300 ft. (see trait; blind beyond this radius)

trait.name: Bleaching
entries: Whenever the Reef Avatar takes 15 Acid damage or more in a single instance, it loses one use of its Legendary Action until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Heart of the Sea
entries: While within 30 feet of the Reef Avatar, creatures with a natural {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} (not provided by a spell or other magical effect) have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Ripplesense
entries: The Reef Avatar can sense the size, distance, and direction to any creature or object that is submerged in at least 1 foot of water within 300 feet of it, including through {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover}. It can also sense the emotional state of any aquatic creature within the area.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The Reef Avatar can breathe only underwater.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Reef Avatar uses its Staff as a Spellcasting Focus and requires no Verbal components to cast the following spells.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Reef Avatar makes one Shell Staff attack and two Darting Spine attacks.

action.name: Shell Staff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Darting Spine
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 10} to hit, range 30/90 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 3d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Poison damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect {@actSave con} {@dc 18} {@actSaveFail} {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} until the start of its next turn.

bonus.name: Defend the Colony
entries: The Reef Avatar summons a Swarm of Defenders in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of it. The swarm is made up of Tiny krakens, sharks, and whales, uses the {@creature Swarm of Piranhas|XMM|Swarm of Piranhas}{@sup *} stat block, and takes its turn immediately after the Reef Avatar. The swarm lasts for 1 minute, after which it magically returns to the safety of the Reef Avatar's body.
{@note {@sup *}If using the 2014 version of the 5e rules, use {@creature Swarm of Quippers|MM}}

legendary.name: Cast a Spell
entries: The Reef Avatar uses Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Cleansing Current
entries: A creature with a {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} within 30 feet of the Reef Avatar regains 6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Darting Spine
entries: The Reef Avatar makes a Darting Spine attack.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Voidspawn Cloak fails a Saving Throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Spacetime Aura
entries: Reality warps in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Voidspawn Cloak. Natural sunlight can't penetrate the area, which is {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} filled with nebulas and pinprick stars. Other creatures and objects can't teleport into the area or while within it, and any spell or other effect that would cause a creature to do so automatically fails. When another creature starts its turn within the area, its movement is warped; roll a {@dice d6} to determine the effect, which lasts until the end of that turn:
The creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced to 0.
The creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved.
The creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is normal.
The creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is doubled.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight from a spell or similar effect, the Voidspawn Cloak can't use its Starstep {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} or Nova Burst Legendary Action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak makes two Claw attacks and one Stinger attack.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d10 + 4}) Piercing damage. The target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 19}), and it is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} until the grapple ends. The Voidspawn Cloak can have up to two creatures {@condition Grappled|XPHB} in this way.

action.name: Stinger
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 15 ft. {@h}30 ({@damage 4d12 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Psychic damage. {@actSave wis} {@dc 20}, a creature hit by this attack. {@actSaveFail} The target's mind is filled with visions of dying stars, and it ages {@dice 2d4} years. Until the end of its next turn, it is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0.

action.name: Enshroud {@recharge 5}
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak sends pieces of its body out as cloaklings to envelop its foes in madness. {@actSave dex} {@dc 20} Each creature of the Voidspawn Cloak's choice within its Spacetime Aura. {@actSaveFail} A cloaking attaches to the target. While a cloakling is attached, the target is {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, can only speak gibberish, and uses its movement to move in a random direction at the start of each of its turns (roll {@dice 1d8} to determine the direction). Each cloakling has AC 10 and 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. In addition, the cloakling halves the damage it takes (round down), and the target takes the same amount of damage.

bonus.name: Starstep
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see and gains {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its next Attack Roll this turn.

legendary.name: Nova Burst
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak causes a miniscule star to go supernova at a point it can see within 60 feet of it. {@actSave dex} {@dc 20} Each creature in a 15-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centred on the point. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Force damage.

legendary.name: Perceive
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak takes the {@action Search|XPHB} action. It has {@sense Blindsight} with a range of 60 feet for the check.

legendary.name: Stinger
entries: The Voidspawn Cloak makes one Stinger attack.

trait.name: Necrotic Premonitions
entries: While the Necropod has {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} from its Draining Necrosis attack, it can use its Sanguine Pulse action and it can see into the near future, granting it a +2 bonus to AC and {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws}.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The Necropod can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Necropod makes three Tentacle attacks. It can replace one attack with a Draining Necrosis attack.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d10 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage and the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 15}) from one of six tentacles. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB} in this way, the target is {@condition Restrained|XPHB}.

action.name: Draining Necrosis
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the Necropod. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 23 ({@damage 5d8}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the Necropod gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Sanguine Pulse
entries: While the Necropod has {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, it can release the necrotic energy stored within it. {@actSave con} {@dc 16} Each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Necropod. {@actSaveFail} 31 ({@damage 7d8}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The Necropod loses all {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} it has.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The Giant can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Icy Deathlight
entries: When a creature that can see the Giant starts its turn within 300 feet of it, it's subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 19}. {@actSaveFail} The target is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the Giant for 10 minutes. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target ignores the Icy Deathlight of other giants. If the target is more than 5 feet from the Giant, the target moves on its turn toward the Giant by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the Giant. It doesn't avoid {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the Giant, the target repeats the save. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this Giant's Icy Deathlight for 24 hours.

trait.name: Frigid Body
entries: A creature that touches the Giant or hits it with a Melee Attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Cold damage.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Giant fails a Saving Throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Pelagic Walker
entries: The Giant can only use its {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} on the water's surface. It sinks 30 feet toward the bottom of any body of water it enters at the end of each of its turns unless it's on the water's surface or it has used its Glaciate action since the start of its last turn.

trait.name: Titan Tracker
entries: The Giant knows the distance and direction to the nearest Titan on the same plane of existence as it. It also has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to damage from creatures' Legendary Actions.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Giant makes two Bone Sledge attacks.

action.name: Bone Sledge
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 15 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage and the target is subjected to the following effect {@actSave str} {@dc 21}. {@actSaveFail} The target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

action.name: Glaciate
entries: If the Giant is underwater, it rises 60 feet toward the surface without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. It can't use this action if it has taken 15+ Fire damage since the start of its last turn.

reaction.name: Cold Fury
entries: {@actTrigger} A Titan damages the Giant. {@actResponse} The Giant takes no damage instead.

legendary.name: Bone Sledge
entries: The Giant makes one Bone Sledge attack.

legendary.name: Refreeze
entries: The Giant uses Glaciate.

trait.name: Light Sensitivity
entries: If the Gazer takes 15+ Radiant damage, it becomes {@condition Blinded|XPHB} until the start of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Gazer uses Lurelights three times and makes one Bite attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Lurelights
entries: The Gazer randomly uses one of the following magical lurelights against a target it can see within 120 feet of itself (roll {@dice 1d8}; reroll if the Gazer has already used that lurelight during this turn):

items.name: Charming Light
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} for 1 hour and repeats the save whenever it takes damage. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB} in this way, it views the Gazer as an ally in peril and attempts to physically assist it.

items.name: Pulling Light
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the Gazer.

items.name: Icy Light
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Cold damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Blinding Light
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Radiant damage, and the target is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Binding Light
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} for 1 minute and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.

items.name: Tormenting Light
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Psychic damage. Until the end of the target's next turn, it can't take {@action Reaction|XPHB|Reactions}, and can only take an action or {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on its turn, not both. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Confusing Light
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Psychic damage and the target must take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} towards the nearest creature that isn't the Gazer and make an attack against that creature. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Bloodied Light
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 33 ({@damage 6d10}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Suffocation Cone
entries: The Gazer's eye creates a 120-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. Until the start of the Gazer's next turn, creatures that start their turn in the area begin to suffocate.

legendary.name: Lurelight
entries: The Gazer uses Lurelights.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The Chuulverin can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Sense Magic
entries: The Chuulverin senses magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the {@spell Detect Magic|XPHB} spell but isn't itself magical.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The Chuulverin deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Chuulverin makes two Pincer attacks.

action.name: Pincer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two pincers.

action.name: Scalding Blast
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Fire damage.

action.name: Solfatara Shot {@recharge 4}
entries: The Chuulverin launches a blob of sulfurous, superheated water at a point within 600 feet of it. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} Each creature in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centred on that point. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Bludgeoning damage and 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Fire damage, which ignores {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Fire damage from being underwater. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} roll {@dice 1d8}. On an 8, a {@creature Chuul|XMM} appears in an unoccupied space within the area. It's an ally to the Chuulverin and takes its turn immediately after the Chuulverin on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Draconimbus fails a Saving Throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Multiple Heads
entries: The Draconimbus has four heads, each of which is associated with a damage type and a headwind (see Headwind action): 1 - Electric (Lightning), 2 - Freezing (Cold), 3 - Maddening (Psychic), and 4 - Thunderous (Thunder). While it has more than one head, the Draconimbus has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|Saving Throws} against being {@condition Blinded|XPHB}, {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, and {@condition Stunned|XPHB}.

Each head of the Draconimbus can be targeted separately and shares the Draconimbus's AC and save modifiers. A head has no {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, but if it takes 30+ damage on a turn, it dissipates and the Draconimbus can't use the associated Headwind. If all of its heads dissipate, the Draconimbus is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} until one or more of its heads regrow.

At the start of each of the Draconimbus' turns, roll {@dice 1d4}. If the number rolled corresponds to a head that is currently dissipated, that head regrows. If it corresponds to a head that isn't dissipated, that head recharges its corresponding headwind. If all of the Draconimbus' heads are dissipated or it has no headwinds available, roll {@dice 2d4} instead and use both results.

trait.name: Reactive Heads
entries: For each head the Draconimbus has beyond one, it gets an extra {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} that can be used only for {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

trait.name: Storm Form
entries: The Draconimbus can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. {@actSave dex} {@dc 20} When it enters an enemy's space for the first time on a turn, that creature is subject to the following effect. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 4d4}) Lightning damage and is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. If a creature fails the save by 5 or more, it is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 20}) inside the body of the Draconimbus. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB} in this way, the target takes 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Lightning damage at the start of each of the Draconimbus' turns.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Draconimbus makes one Bite attack with each head it has and uses Headwinds.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 13} to hit, reach 15 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 5}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 4d4}) damage of the type associated with the biting head.

action.name: Headwinds
entries: Choose one of the following options. Once the Draconimbus uses an option, it must recharge that headwind before it can use it again (see Multiple Heads). The Draconimbus can't use a headwind if the corresponding head is dissipated.

items.name: Electric Wind
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20} Each creature in a 100-foot-long, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. A creature wearing metal armour has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the saving throw. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Lightning damage. If a creature fails the save by 5 or more, it is {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} until the start of its next turn and drops any held creatures or objects. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

items.name: Freezing Wind
entries: Each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} must make a {@dc 20} Constitution Saving Throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Cold damage, and the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half damage only.

items.name: Maddening Wind
entries: Each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone} must make a {@dc 20} Wisdom Saving Throw. On a failure, a creature takes 26 ({@damage 4d12}) Psychic damage, and the target immediately moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} directly towards the nearest body of water it can see. On a success, a creature takes half damage only.

items.name: Thunderous Wind
entries: Each creature in a 40-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Draconimbus must make a {@dc 20} Constitution Saving Throw. On a failure, a creature takes 33 ({@damage 6d10}) Thunder damage, and the target is {@condition Deafened|XPHB} and knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}. On a success, a creature takes half damage only.

legendary.name: Bite
entries: The Draconimbus makes one Bite attack.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: The Draconimbus takes the {@action Search|XPHB} action and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the check.

legendary.name: Gale Winds
entries: Each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the Draconimbus must make a {@dc 20} Strength Saving Throw. On a failure, the target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB} and pushed 10 feet straight away from the Draconimbus.

trait.name: Cloudweight
entries: Areas of strong wind, such as that created by the {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB} spell, are {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for the Meowsoon.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: If the Meowsoon is motionless at the start of combat, it has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on its {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} roll. Additionally, a creature that hasn't seen the Meowsoon use its movement or take an action, {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, or {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} believes it to be an ordinary cloud. A creature that takes the {@action Study|XPHB} action to examine the Meowsoon can determine its true nature with a successful {@dc 10} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check (DC = 8 + Dex + PB).

action.name: Voltaiclaw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Lightning damage.

trait.name: Maddening Whispers
entries: The Pengkin exudes an aura that corrupts psionic abilities in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from it. When a creature attempts to communicate magically within that area by an effect other than the Pengkin's telepathy (such as by the {@spell Message|XPHB} or {@spell Sending|XPHB} spells), the effect fails, and the creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

trait.name: Slide (1/Turn)
entries: If the Pengkin is {@condition Prone|XPHB}, it can slide across flat surfaces instead of crawling and has a {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} of 35 feet while doing so. If the Pengkin gives itself the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition voluntarily, it can right itself and end the condition without expending any movement.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Pengkin is an innate spellcaster and doesn't require Material components.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Pengkin makes two Quarterstaff attacks.

action.name: Quarterstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Ray of Frost (Cantrip)
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 7} to hit, range 60 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d8}) Cold damage. If the target is a creature, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the Rimejarl's next turn.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the Soul Hoarder fails a Saving Throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Shadow of Summons
entries: While the Soul Hoarder is within 5 feet of a creature {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by it, it can halve any damage it takes, and the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creature takes the same amount of damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Soul Hoarder is an innate spellcaster and doesn't use Material components.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Soul Hoarder makes four Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Subduing Breath or Release Specimen if available.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 4d4 + 3}) Force damage.

action.name: Subduing Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 20} Each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Force damage and a creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced to 0 until the start of the Soul Hoarder's next turn. Failure by 5 or More: A creature falls {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} for 1 minute. It wakes up early if it takes damage or another creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it awake.

action.name: Release Specimen {@recharge 6}
entries: The Soul Hoarder opens a jar, releasing a specimen into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The specimen is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the Soul Hoarder until either it or the Soul Hoarder is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The specimen takes its turn directly after the Soul Hoarder and follows its commands (no action required by the Soul Hoarder). The Soul Hoarder can recapture a released specimen as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

When the Soul Hoarder releases a specimen, it chooses from one of the following options: {@creature Bulette|XMM}, {@creature Otyugh|XMM}, {@creature Salamander|XMM}, {@creature Triceratops|XMM}, {@creature Wraith|XMM}. Once an option has been released, it can't be released again until the Soul Hoarder recaptures it.

reaction.name: Capture
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 60 feet of the Soul Hoarder falls {@condition Unconscious|XPHB}. {@actResponse}{@actSave con} {@dc 20} The triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} The target is imprisoned in one of the Soul Hoarder's jars. While in the jar, the target shrinks to fit inside and is {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}. At the next dawn, the target is {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the Soul Hoarder and can be released with its Release Specimen action.

The jar has AC 10; 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}; and {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to Poison and Psychic damage. It has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Three-Quarters Cover} while held by the Soul Hoarder. Shattering the jar releases the specimen inside, which returns to its normal size and appears in the nearest unoccupied space within 5 feet of the jar.

legendary.name: Cast a Spell
entries: The Soul Hoarder uses Spellcasting.

legendary.name: Slink
entries: The Soul Hoarder moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Puppeteer (2 Actions)
entries: The Soul Hoarder commands a {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creature within 60 feet of it. That creature uses its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one Weapon Attack.

variant.name: Additional Specimens
entries: At the GM's discretion, the Soul Hoarder may have other specimens in its collection that it can unleash using its Release Specimen action. To maintain the Soul Hoarder's listed {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB}, creatures released by this action should be no higher than CR 5. If a released creature has Legendary Resistances or Legendary Actions, it doesn't have them when it's used by the Soul Hoarder in this way.

trait.name: Council of Three
entries: Three Briar Lords can undergo a 1-hour ritual to become a council of three. While within 60 feet of two other members of its council that don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, the Briar Lord has proficiency in all Saving Throws, as well as access to its Exchanging Strikes action and Slice as One {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB}.

Award a party an additional 4,100 XP (5,900 XP total) for defeating the Briar Lord while it is within 60 feet of two other members of its council that don't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the Briar Lord remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal piece of foliage. If a creature hasn't seen the Briar Lord move or act, it can attempt a {@dc 18} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check, identifying the foliage as a Plant creature on a success.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Briar Lord makes two Venomous Glaive attacks.

action.name: Venomous Glaive
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Slashing damage and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target is {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} for 1 minute.

action.name: Exchanging Strikes (Council Only)
entries: The Briar Lord throws its Glaive, exchanging it with the Glaive of another Briar Lord within 60 feet of it. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} Each creature in a 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line} between the two Briar Lords. {@actSaveFail} 16 ({@damage 3d10}) Piercing damage and 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Poison damage and the creature is {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} for 1 minute. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way, a creature's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

bonus.name: Leaf in the Wind
entries: The Briar Lord jumps to an unoccupied space it can see within 15 feet of it. If the space is on a wall or ceiling, the Briar Lord sticks to it, but can't move from that position without leaping again or falling.

reaction.name: Slice as One (Council Only)
entries: {@actTrigger} Another Briar Lord within 60 feet of the Briar Lord makes a Melee Weapon Attack. {@actResponse} The Briar Lord makes one Venomous Glaive attack against a target within reach.

trait.name: Dealmaker
entries: When Sangrimm casts a spell other than one he can cast at will, he must target a willing creature other than himself. As part of the casting, the target loses a number of months of its lifespan equal to the spell's level, and Sangrimm's lifespan increases by the same amount.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Sangrimm fails a Saving Throw, he can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Metaphysical Manifestation
entries: Sangrimm uses his Charisma in place of his Strength or Dexterity for Attack Rolls. On the Imaginal Plane, Sangrimm also does this for Ability Checks and Saving Throws that use Strength or Dexterity.

trait.name: Overwhelm
entries: If Sangrimm moves 20+ feet in a straight line, he gains a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} equal to his {@variantrule Speed|XPHB|Walk Speed} until the end of the turn and can move through the spaces of Medium or smaller creatures as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. A creature whose space Sangrimm moves through in this way for the first time on a turn is subjected to the following effect: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Sangrimm is an innate spellcaster and doesn't require Material components.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Sangrimm makes one Leeching Claw attack and two Sanguine Swarm attacks.

action.name: Leeching Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 4d4 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Necrotic damage. Sangrimm regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the Necrotic damage taken.

action.name: Sanguine Swarm
entries: Sangrimm launches a bolt of blood-red life essence. {@atk rs} {@hit 10} to hit, range 90 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 4d6}) Necrotic damage. {@hom} A {@creature Swarm of Vitality Bats|HFN2025} appears under Sangrimm's control in a space within 5 feet of the target. The swarm takes its turn immediately after Sangrimm and dissipates at the start of Sangrimm's next turn.

bonus.name: Vanishing Act
entries: Sangrimm teleports to an unoccupied space he can see within 30 feet of himself. {@actSave con} {@dc 18} Each creature within 5 feet of Sangrimm when he disappears or reappears. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendary.name: Bloodflame
entries: Sangrimm creates a spike of crimson necrotic flame from the ground that shoots up at a creature. {@actSave dex} {@dc 18} One creature Sangrimm can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the damage taken. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

legendary.name: Ringleader
entries: Sangrimm commands one {@creature Swarm of Vitality Bats|HFN2025} he controls within 60 feet. The swarm can move up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make one attack.

legendary.name: Showmanship
entries: Sangrimm makes a contested Charisma ({@skill Performance|XPHB}) check against the Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}) check of a creature that isn't fighting him within 120 feet of him that can see or hear him. If his check total is higher, the creature jeers distractingly at Sangrimm's foes. The next Attack Roll made against Sangrimm before the start of his next turn has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}.

trait.name: Built of Bits
entries: While the Hivebound Champion is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Hivebound Champion makes two Pseudopod attacks and one Scrap Metal Mace or Fling Form attack.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Acid damage.

action.name: Scrap Metal Mace
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d12 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Fling Form (Requires 25+ Hit Points)
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 20/60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Acid damage. {@hom} The Hivebound Champion takes Bludgeoning damage equal to the Acid damage rolled, which can't be reduced or prevented in any way, and an {@creature Armoured Blob|HFN2025} appears in the nearest unoccupied space to the target. A blob has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the damage taken by the Hivebound Champion and takes its turn immediately after the Hivebound Champion on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count.

bonus.name: Absorb
entries: The Hivebound Champion absorbs an {@creature Armoured Blob|HFN2025} within 5 feet of it, causing it to disappear, and regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the blob's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

reaction.name: Split
entries: {@actTrigger} The Hivebound Champion takes 10+ Slashing damage in a single instance. {@actResponse} The Hivebound Champion creates an {@creature Armoured Blob|HFN2025} in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of it. The blob has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the triggering damage and takes its turn immediately after the Hivebound Champion on the same {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB} count.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blob makes two Pseudopod attacks.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Acid damage.

trait.name: Tunneler
entries: The wanderer can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. The first time it emerges from one of those materials on a turn, debris erupts from the opening. {@actSave str} {@dc 15} Each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the wanderer when it emerges. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The wanderer makes three attacks, using Claw and Elemental Orb in any combination.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Elemental Orb
entries: The wanderer tosses a bead formed from an element of its choice. {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 40/120 ft. {@h}The target suffers one of the following effects:

items.name: Air
entries: 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Lightning damage and each creature within 10 feet of the target takes 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Thunder damage.

items.name: Earth
entries: 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Bludgeoning damage and the target is knocked {@condition Prone|XPHB}.

items.name: Fire
entries: 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Fire damage and the target starts Burning.

items.name: Water
entries: 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Bludgeoning damage and the target is pushed 15 feet away from the wanderer.

action.name: Fusion Blast (Only While Bloodied)
entries: The wanderer chooses two elemental beads to fuse together in a blast of energy. {@actSave con} {@dc 15} Each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the wanderer. {@actSaveFail} The target suffers one of the following effects depending on the elements fused. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

items.name: Ice
entries: 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Cold damage, and the creature is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} by ice until the end of its next turn.

items.name: Magma
entries: 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} Until the start of the wanderer's next turn, the area is lit ablaze. When a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 1 Fire damage for every 5 feet it travels.

items.name: Mud
entries: 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The area becomes {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} until cleared.

items.name: Smoke
entries: 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Fire damage, and the creature is {@condition Blinded|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

monster.name: Soulstitcher Laceguard
languages: The languages it knew in life

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The soulstitcher can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The soulstitcher makes two Shaw! attacks.

action.name: Shaw!
entries: The soulstitcher stabs or throws its needle. The needle can pass through objects and structures that aren't silver or lead, ignoring {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} provided by them. {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Force damage. If the needle was used to make a ranged attack, the soulstitcher can pull itself in a straight line to the unoccupied space nearest to the target.

action.name: Edino!
entries: The soulstitcher scatters three ethereal pin traps into unoccupied spaces it can see within 30 feet of it. The traps are immovable, can be suspended midair, and last until triggered or until the soulstitcher takes this action again. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} A creature that moves within 5 feet of the trap. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The trap is destroyed.

action.name: Hegale!
entries: The soulstitcher fills the air with a twisting spectral thread that cuts through the soul. {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} Each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the soulstitcher. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by the amount equal to the damage taken. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Garama!
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the soulstitcher can see within 60 feet of it casts a level 1+ spell. {@actResponse} {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} The triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Force damage, and the spell dissipates with no effect.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The soulstitcher can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The soulstitcher makes two Shaw! attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Edino! or Hegale!

action.name: Shaw!
entries: The soulstitcher stabs or throws its needle. The needle can pass through objects and structures that aren't silver or lead, ignoring {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} provided by them. {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d10 + 5}) Force damage. If the needle was used to make a ranged attack, the soulstitcher can pull itself in a straight line to the unoccupied space nearest to the target.

action.name: Edino!
entries: The soulstitcher scatters three ethereal pin traps into unoccupied spaces it can see within 30 feet of it. The traps are immovable, can be suspended midair, and last until triggered or until the soulstitcher takes this action again. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17} A creature that moves within 5 feet of the trap. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The trap is destroyed.

action.name: Hegale!
entries: The soulstitcher fills the air with a twisting spectral thread that cuts through the soul. {@actSave dex} {@dc 17} Each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the soulstitcher. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Necrotic damage, and the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by the amount equal to the damage taken. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

reaction.name: Garama!
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the soulstitcher can see within 60 feet of it casts a level 1+ spell. {@actResponse} {@actSave dex} {@dc 17} The triggering creature. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Force damage, and the spell dissipates with no effect.

entries: The soulstitcher makes three Shaw! attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Edino! or Hegale!

action.name: Shaw!

The needle can pass through objects and structures that aren't silver or lead, ignoring {@variantrule Cover|XPHB} provided by them. {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 6}) Force damage. If the needle was used to make a ranged attack, the soulstitcher can pull itself in a straight line to the unoccupied space nearest to the target.

The traps are immovable, can be suspended midair, and last until triggered or until the soulstitcher takes this action again. {@actSave dex} {@dc 19} A creature that moves within 5 feet of the trap. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The trap is destroyed.
